title: Thanos system

The '''Thanos system''',<ref name="GG4" /> also known as the '''Togoria system''',<ref name="TEA" /> was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located within the [[Taldot sector/Legends|Taldot sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. It contained two inhabited worlds, [[Togoria/Legends|Togoria]] and [[Thanos]],<ref name="TEA" /> that orbited the white-blue [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Thanos (star)|Thanos]].<ref name="GG4" /><ref name="TCSWE" /> Togoria was the homeworld of the [[Togorian/Legends|Togorians]]<ref name="GG4" /> and [[Thanos]] was known for its [[Thanos|shipyard]].<ref name="TEA" />

*''[[The Clone Wars: Act on Instinct]]'' {{C|Appears on screen only}}
*[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] {{1stID|Togoria system}}
